zh.lifeSummary: 當Matheis Landorf於大約1555年出生在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利時，他的父親Hans Landorf36歲，母親Agatha Schwartz33歲。他於大約1582年與Agatha Schwarz結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1608年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matheis Landorf于大约1555年出生在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利时，他的父亲Hans Landorf36岁，母亲Agatha Schwartz33岁。他于大约1582年与Agatha Schwarz结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1608年在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Landorf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of numerous places in northwestern Germany named Handorf.

nameMeanings.name: Matheis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Helmut, Nikolaus, Otto, Ulrich, Wolfgang.
German: from a variant of the personal name Matthäus or Mathias (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Matheis Landorf was born about 1555, in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, his father, Hans Landorf, was 36 and his mother, Agatha Schwartz, was 33. He married Agatha Schwarz about 1582. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1608, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne
Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.(Erfweiler-Ehlingen) Mandelbachtal, Sarr: Erfweiler-Ehlingen, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matheis Landorf est né environ 1555, à Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, son père, Hans Landorf, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agatha Schwartz, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Agatha Schwarz environ 1582. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1608, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matheis Landorf um 1555 in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Landorf 36 und seine Mutter Agatha Schwartz 33. Er hat um 1582 Agatha Schwarz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1608 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matheis Landorf è nato il circa 1555 nel Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, il suo padre, Hans Landorf, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agatha Schwartz, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Agatha Schwarz circa 1582. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1608, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラー

ja.Erfweiler, Sudwestpfalz, Rheinland-Pfalz: ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスエルフウエイラー
ja.lifeSummary: Matheis Landorfが約1555年にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラーで生まれた時，父Hans Landorfは36歳，母Agatha Schwartzは33歳であった。約1582年にAgatha Schwarzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1608年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matheis Landorf(이)가 대략 1555년 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 먼델바트앨 르프위러에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Landorf(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agatha Schwartz(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1582년 Agatha Schwarz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1608년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matheis Landorf nasceu aproximadamente 1555, em Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Landorf, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agatha Schwartz, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha Schwarz aproximadamente 1582. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1608, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matheis Landorf родился около 1555 г. в местности эрфвилир, манделбачталь, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия, его отцу по имени Hans Landorf было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha Schwartz, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha Schwarz около 1582 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1608 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matheis Landorf nació aproximadamente 1555, en Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, su papá, Hans Landorf, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agatha Schwartz, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Agatha Schwarz aproximadamente 1582. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1608, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
